headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays edged the Detroit Tigers in a thrilling 2-1 victory, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense. In other action, the St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, while the Colorado Rockies secured a 4-2 win over the Arizona Diamondbacks. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3, with Keibert Ruiz leading the Nationals' offense.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Hunter Harvey, who has been transferred to the 60-day injured list due to right triceps inflammation. Other players on the injured list include Ty Madden, Ryan O'Hearn, Jose Trevino, Tommy Nance, Jake Fraley, Heliot Ramos, and Ben Joyce.

The Chicago White Sox made a significant roster move, acquiring center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash and acquired left-handed pitcher José Suarez from the Seattle Mariners in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks with 2 RBI, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 10-run victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Hunter Harvey Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs right-handed pitcher Hunter Harvey has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right triceps inflammation.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. This move adds depth to the White Sox outfield.
